title: PushUrgency known variants lack serialization tests
description: PushUrgency::VeryLow/Low/Normal/High have no test asserting their as_str() wire strings. The only coverage is the Unknown(String) round-trip test. A maintainer editing as_str() has no CI safety net for the known RFC 8030 wire strings. Consequence: silent regression where ChatPushConfig urgency serializes wrong values to the push endpoint.
